notes: No official OpenAPI/Swagger or Postman collection published by Safaricom for the Daraja API; authored by hand from the Daraja developer docs and the adaptor source. Covers the exact endpoints the mpesa adaptor calls: OAuth token (/oauth/v1/generate), STK Push (/mpesa/stkpush/v1/processrequest), transaction status (/mpesa/transactionstatus/v1/query), C2B register URL (/mpesa/c2b/v1/registerurl), B2B remit tax (/mpesa/b2b/v1/remittax), and B2B buy goods (/mpesa/b2b/v1/paymentrequest). The adaptor's generic request() helper can hit any Daraja path and is not separately modelled. Most Daraja endpoints return only a synchronous acknowledgement (modelled here); the real transaction result is delivered asynchronously to caller-supplied callback/result URLs, which are out of scope for the mocker. RegisterUrl response field name 'OriginatorCoversationID' reflects the documented Daraja spelling.
